hooks.name: guards-shell
hooks.description: Consolidated Python guard (destructive commands + audit log). Stdlib-only: swap `uv run --script` for `python3` if preferred.

hooks.name: guards-filesystem
hooks.description: Consolidated Python guard (secret paths, credential content, IAM wildcard-admin, OWASP warn tier, audit log). One process replaces five shell pipelines.

hooks.name: guards-prompt
hooks.description: Scan the user's own prompt for credential material before it enters context/session logs (idea from disler/claude-code-hooks-mastery UserPromptSubmit validation). Audit records length only, never prompt content.

hooks.name: format-web-on-save
hooks.description: Prettier via the project-local binary directly — no npx/bunx launcher (3x faster), and inert-by-design in projects without prettier installed.

hooks.name: tofu-fmt-on-save
hooks.description: OpenTofu canonical formatting on any .tf/.tfvars save.

hooks.name: tflint-on-save
hooks.description: tflint on the saved file's module directory; findings surface as a user warning (exit 1). Silently skips if tflint absent.

action.command: command -v tflint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; OUT=$(tflint --format=compact --chdir="$(dirname "{{filePath}}")" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$OUT" ]; then echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0

hooks.name: json-validate-on-save
hooks.description: jq syntax check on every JSON save (policies, configs, this file).

hooks.name: gitleaks-scan-on-save
hooks.description: Secret CONTENT scan on every save (entropy + rules, catches what the regex tier misses). Tries v8.19+ dir mode, falls back to detect. Skips if gitleaks absent.

action.command: command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; gitleaks dir "{{filePath}}" --no-banner --exit-code 9 >/dev/null 2>&1; RC=$?; [ $RC -eq 0 ] && exit 0; [ $RC -ne 9 ] && gitleaks detect --no-git --no-banner -s "{{filePath}}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; echo "gitleaks: potential secret committed to {{filePath}} — inspect before pushing" >&2; exit 1
git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo "## Git context"; git status -sb; echo; echo "Recent commits:"; git log --oneline -5; } || true

hooks.name: remind-tests-on-write
hooks.description: Opt-in v3 agent action (no subprocess): static steering nudge on every write.

action.prompt: If this change modifies source code behavior, verify the corresponding tests are updated or added before finishing the task.

hooks.name: notify-task-complete
hooks.description: macOS banner when a spec task finishes (PostTaskExec = per-task granularity that native chat.enableNotifications doesn't give). Inert without osascript.

action.command: command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification "Spec task complete" with title "Kiro" sound name "Glass"' >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

hooks.name: notify-session-done
hooks.description: macOS banner at session end. Redundant if chat.enableNotifications covers you — delete or disable if it's noise.

action.command: command -v osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification "Session ended" with title "Kiro" sound name "Glass"' >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0

hooks.name: memory-recall
hooks.description: Two-tier memory: inject STM digest (last session, bounded at 200 lines) + LTM note index at session start. Deep retrieval via the Memory knowledge base.

hooks.name: memory-distill
hooks.description: Distill the just-ended session JSONL into an LTM markdown note + refreshed STM digest. Heuristic extraction, credential-scrubbed, fail-open.
